author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 51f1b9d. CLI: -U/--multiline with clap conflicts_with_all against the 8 line-scoped flags; threaded through build_op_from_cli; works in file + pipe modes. JSON: multiline:true accepted on replace/delete via the flattened Op; JsonOp gains a flattened extra map for misuse detection — NOTE serde flatten-buffering copies ALL keys into the map (even consumed ones), so detection is op-kind-gated, not presence-gated (first attempt failed exactly this way; regression-tested). Rejection = invalid_request with operation_index; explicit false tolerated. Scripts: --multiline/-U on replace/delete, line-numbered parse error elsewhere. Docs: README (quick start, CLI ref, ops table), xtask schema (+multiline property; also fixed stale op enum missing transform/surround/indent/dedent). 15 new tests. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean. Also fixed .gitignore for nested .crosslink/.cache stamps (**/ prefix — internal-slash patterns are root-anchored).
